message:
feat(testing): Add Performance Metrics Collection with baseline tracking

Implements comprehensive metric collection for E2E test regression detection:

- E2eLogger.emit_metric() for single metric emission
- Standalone emit_metric() function for shell-like usage
- MetricBaseline struct with timestamp and commit tracking
- load_baselines() / save_baselines() for persistence
- compare_to_baseline() for regression detection (>20% threshold)
- check_metric_regression() for all-in-one metric + alert
- standard_metrics module with 7 standard metric constants:
  - indexing_duration_ms
  - search_latency_p50_ms / p99_ms
  - memory_peak_kb
  - index_size_bytes
  - files_processed
  - queries_per_second

Baselines stored in test-results/baselines.json.

Closes: coding_agent_session_search-1bqi

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
